title: Teach-by-Touch Robotic Arm
desc: Physically move joints to record a sequence, insert a cartridge, press play. Custom DC motors, 3D-printed gearboxes, no programming needed.

title: Perfect Pantograph — Research
desc: Researched, interviewed and surveyed Design & Technology students to identify where current downfalls are.

title: Perfect Pantograph — Ideation
desc: Designed a desktop cutting tool that helps D&T students translate drawings into scale models. Developed from research insights to a final resolved design.

title: Aerodynamic Cabriolet - Individual
desc: Designed a four-seat cabriolet body through CFD in Ansys Workbench. Cut drag by 14% iteratively, then 3D printed and wind-tunnel validated.

title: Cabriolet & Battery - Group
desc: Wind tunnel testing and CFD validation of car and battery design. Includes Gantt, team contributions breakdown, and full comparative analysis.

title: Long-Haul Aircraft Comfort - Research
desc: 122-person survey, stakeholder mapping across passengers, crew, maintenance and procurement. Benchmarked major seat manufacturers.

title: Long-Haul Aircraft Comfort - Ideation
desc: Modular seat redesign with adjustable geometry and separable soft goods, informed by a 122-person survey and full stakeholder mapping.

title: Cycling Shoe Attachment
desc: A neoprene toecap and BOA-laced heel strap that clips onto any office shoe, so you can cycle to work without changing footwear.

title: Rhythm Rush - Research
desc: Researched how concert-goers experience queuing. Ran user interviews and surveys to uncover the social awkwardness and boredom of waiting.

title: Rhythm Rush - Development
desc: A motion-tracked dance battle game for concert queues. Up to four players compete via body-tracking on a large screen, scored on creativity and rhythm.

title: Child-Friendly Hand Mixer
desc: Reverse engineering report- disassembly, materials identification, manufacturing process analysis.

title: Phone Stand CAD
desc: Fusion 360 - technical drawings, tolerance and fit, prototyping and modelling.

title: Logo Design
desc: Just a small thing on making a logo because I thought it was cool

title: Duck Jam - Game Jam Winner
desc: Won first place in Duck Sauce Game Jam. Autoscrolling river game where collecting ducks layers a live melody.

title: Abyssal - Game Jam Winner
desc: Won first place in Duck Sauce Game Jam. 2D underwater exploration with narrative discovery.

title: Dodgy Double Decker
desc: 3D bus-driving game, with online leaderboard. Did all game design and programming in Unity using C#.
